query:
SELECT a.number as num_13dig, b.number as num_12dig, a.cnt as msgs_13, b.cnt as msgs_12
FROM (
  SELECT REPLACE(remoteJid, '@s.whatsapp.net', '') as number, COUNT(*) as cnt 
  FROM messages WHERE remoteJid LIKE '55%@s.whatsapp.net' 
  GROUP BY remoteJid
) a
JOIN (
  SELECT REPLACE(remoteJid, '@s.whatsapp.net', '') as number, COUNT(*) as cnt 
  FROM messages WHERE remoteJid LIKE '55%@s.whatsapp.net' 
  GROUP BY remoteJid
) b
ON SUBSTRING(a.number, 1, 4) = SUBSTRING(b.number, 1, 4)
AND LENGTH(a.number) = 13 AND LENGTH(b.number) = 12
AND SUBSTRING(a.number, 5, 1) = '9'
AND SUBSTRING(a.number, 6) = SUBSTRING(b.number, 5);

FROM (
  SELECT REPLACE(remoteJid, '@s.whatsapp.net', '') as number, COUNT(*) as cnt
